replies.body: Of course i have some software on my website now Thts been running on myfxbook for around 9 months low drawdown under 5% steady returns another’s thats under 8% check them out link is in bio. CRT which is the software from the post will be added to myfxbook next month and to MQL5 but we can have conversation if you was interested finding out more about it.
